title: Hands silk touch
description: This datapack enchants your hands with a silk touch and allows you to break some blocks without it.
body:
---
**This datapack enchants your hands with a silk touch and allows you to break some blocks without it.**\
**(So far, not all blocks work)**

---

<details>
<summary>Example</summary>

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jP4ArKvZ/images/f7a9fb5fb0cdd584bbc408089e6f6aa9502b0778.gif)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Blocks</summary>

| Block/s             | Work               |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
| Glasses           | Yes              |
| Glasses pane            | Yes              |
| Bee nest            | No              |
| Leaves | No |
| Grasses | No |
| Vine |No |
| Nether sprout | No |
| Dead bush | No |

</details>

---
